packageRules.description: TypeScript 7 changed internals (the native/Go-based rewrite) that svelte-check@4.7.3 (latest published release) hasn't been updated for — it crashes with `TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'useCaseSensitiveFileNames')` in its bundled FileMap/ConfigLoader code. Re-enable once svelte-check ships TS 7 support.
